title: Intense Smoky Australian Lamb Tagine
description: A one-pot Australian dish featuring high heat cooking oil and dehydrated ingredients, cooked in a ceramic tagine, this recipe combines the bold flavors of lamb with the richness of smoky spices.
instructions: Heat the avocado oil in the ceramic tagine over high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and sear until browned on all sides.
Add the smoked paprika, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the dried apricots and prunes, and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours.
Remove the lid and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
Refrigerate or freeze leftovers for up to 5 days.
Reheat leftovers in the tagine over low heat, stirring occasionally.
